case_title: GUANG YUAN LIN VS. JOHNSON TOM

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, GUANG YUAN AS TO DEFENDANT TOM, JOHNSON AKA CHAN SHUNG TOM, AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA TOM'S CONSTRUCTION COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, GUANG YUAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOM, JOHNSON AKA CHAN SHUNG TOM, AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA TOM'S CONSTRUCTION COMPANY $11,593.16 PRINCIPAL, $76.58 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,969.74, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
